strengths: ~15 years of software engineering experience across web, mobile, embedded
Founder of GISCollective open-source platform shows entrepreneurial initiative
Some exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling at re:cinq
concerns: No demonstrated AI/ML expertise, products, or platforms built with AI
No advanced degree (Master's/PhD) in AI-related field; no recognized AI expertise
Career level is Senior/Staff IC, not Director-level/Principal with strategic advisory experience

key_factors.factor: Lack of demonstrated AI products or platforms
Insufficient seniority for Director-level IC role
Recent MCP/agentic tooling exposure at re:cinq

response.justification: The role requires recognized AI expertise with demonstrated AI products, cloud/AI strategic advisory experience, and Director-level individual contributor seniority. The résumé shows ~15 years of solid full-stack engineering (TypeScript, Node.js, DLang) and founder experience with GISCollective, meeting the baseline experience requirement. However, AI experience is limited to a brief mention of contributing to MCP code generators and agent frameworks at re:cinq (since April 2025), with no shipped AI products, no ML background, and no advanced AI degree. Cloud experience is present (AWS CDK, Kubernetes) but not at a strategic-platform level. Titles peak at Staff/Senior Developer, not Principal/Director, and there is no evidence of advising strategic customers or inspiring industry-wide adoption. Evidence supports a competent senior engineer, not a Principal AI strategist.
